theme: The science behind team building that actually works

linkedin.text:
Most team building is a waste of money.

There. We said it.

Trust falls? Icebreakers? Escape rooms where half the team checks their phone?

Here's what the research actually says works:

📊 Shared novel experiences increase team cohesion by 67% (Harvard Business Review)
📊 Physical challenges together release oxytocin — the trust hormone
📊 Informal meals boost cross-department collaboration 3x more than formal meetings
📊 Teams that travel together show 41% better conflict resolution

The formula isn't complicated:
New environment + genuine challenge + shared achievement = lasting bonds.

Stop doing team building that checks a box.
Start creating experiences that change relationships.

That's what we design. 200+ events. 16 years. Zero trust falls.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#TeamBuilding #CorporateEvents #HRStrategy #EmployeeEngagement #IncentiveTravel #UproductionEvents #Leadership #TeamDevelopment
